title: 2025 Government Procurement Card spend for transactions over £500
body: "View Forestry Commission spending on the Government Procurement Card.  As of April 2025, there will be zero spend over £500 on the GPC for Forestry Commission and Forestry England. This is because of the reduced single transaction limit of £500 implemented in April.  If any circumstances lead to spending over £500, or the GPC limit increases, the data will be published on this page.  "
